column6: Identifies if Quote has been Quoteed
column9:
DECISION: Primary Quote Not Quoteed?
Primary Quote.Quoteed__c EQUALS FALSE
AND Primary Quote.Hardware_Quote__c EQUALS FALSE
AND Primary Quote.Status EQUALS Approved OR Accepted

UPDATE TRIGGERING RECORD:
Primary Quote.Quoteed__c checkbox EQUALS TRUE
Auto Create Quote

column6: Identifies if Hardware Quote has been Quoteed
column9:
DECISION: Primary Quote Hardware and Not Quoteed?
Primary Quote.Quoteed__c EQUALS FALSE
AND Primary Quote.Hardware_Quote__c EQUALS TRUE
AND Primary Quote.Opportunity.StageName ISCHANGED EQUALS TRUE
AND Primary Quote.Opportunity.StageName EQUAL Closed Won

UPDATE Primary Quote.Quoteed__c checkbox EQUALS TRUE
Auto Create Quote WAIT 1 Minute 

UPDATE TRIGGERING RECORD: 
Quote.Status to Activated
Quote.InvoiceBatch__c to Hardware Quote

column6: Identifies if Quote is Primary
column9:
DECISION: New Quote?

UPDATE TRIGGERING RECORD:
Quote.IsPrimary__c EQUALS TRUE

OR

DECISION: Quote Approved or Accepted?
Quote.IsPrimary__c EQUALS FALSE
AND
Quote.Status EQUALS Accepted
OR
Quote.Status EQUALS Approved

UPDATE TRIGGERING RECORD:
Quote.IsPrimary__c EQUALS TRUE

column6: Identifies Quote's Payment Method (Rep Entered)
column9:
DECISION: Quote Hardware Payment Terms/Methods Update?
Quote.Hardware_Quote__c EQUALS TRUE

UPDATE TRIGGERING RECORD: 
Quote.Payment_Terms__c EQUALS Due on receipt
Quote.Payment_Methods__c EQUALS Credit Card

column6: Identifies Quote's Payment Terms (Rep Entered)
column9:
DECISION: Quote Hardware Payment Terms/Methods Update?
Quote.Hardware_Quote__c EQUALS TRUE

UPDATE TRIGGERING RECORD: 
Quote.Payment_Terms__c EQUALS Due on receipt
Quote.Payment_Methods__c EQUALS Credit Card

column6: Identifies Quote's Billing Frequency (Rep Entered)
column9: If aRep enters a value into this field, it should carry over to the corresponding Quote Lines that are NOT One-Time

column6: Identifies Quote's Default Subscription Term (Rep Entered)
column9: If a Rep enters a value into this field, it should carry over to the corresponding Quote Lines that are NOT One-Time

column6: Identifies Quote's Default Charge Type (Rep Entered)
column9: If a Rep enters a value into this field, it should carry over to the corresponding Quote Lines

column6: Identifies Quote's Default Billing Schedule
column9: If Rep entered default values for Billing Frequency, Charge Type, Subscription Term then this value should update with Billing_Schedule_Result__c value based on table mapping

column6: Indicates if a Billing Schedule mapping result was identified and successfully populated the Default Billing Schedule field
column9:
If Default Billing Schedule has been populated, the status should be "Derived".
If no value could be found and the Default Billing Schedule field is blank, set the status to "Needs Review"

column6: Checked to show all price totals have been Calculated
column9: When Quote Lines are added or updated, this should be checked after all the product amounts have been calculated.

column6: Should contain the total percentage of Applied Discounts for Quote Lines
column9:
ASSIGNMENT: Add Quote Line Values to Totals
EQUALS Discount (Percentage) sum for All Quote Lines

column6: Should contain the total percentage of Applied Discount Amounts for Quote Lines
column9:
ASSIGNMENT: Add Quote Line Values to Totals
EQUALS Discount (Amount) sum for All Quote Lines

column6: Should show the grand total from all Quote LInes
column9:
ASSIGNMENT: Add Quote Line Values to Totals
EQUALS Net Total Price sum for All Quote Lines

column6: Provides the status for calculation fields tied to the Revenue Lifecycle.
column9:
If currency fields have populated on the Quote (fields like ARR, MRR, etc), this status field should be set to "Calculated"
If currency fields are blank, this status field should be set to "Not Calculated"
If any issues occur and oinly some of the currency fields have been calculated. this status should be set to "Error"

column6: Earliest Start Date for Quote
column9: Should be populated with the earliest Quote Line Start Date

column6: Latest End Date for Quote
column9: Should be populated with the latest Quote Line End Date
